# Patrick Gordon

Patrick Gordon is a 16-year-old from Naas, Kildare, Ireland.

## Sports

- Former cross-country runner, competed with Naas Athletic Club (Naas AC)
- Top 50 ranked tennis player in Ireland at U14 level, represented Naas CBS
- Football player for Naas AFC

## Business

- Founder of PG Creative Studio (pgcs.ie), a creative agency based in Naas, Kildare

## Links

- Personal site: https://www.patrickgordon.ie/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@_patrickgordon
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/patrick.gordon7
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-gordon-9a8422361
